# Email Template — Supervisor Charter Sign-Off

**Subject:** Request for sign-off: pk-pr-simulator project charter v1.0

---

Dear `[Supervisor Name]`,

Please find attached (or linked) the **Project Charter v1.0** for my thesis/research project: *Pakistan-Focused Population Opinion Simulator for Company PR Scenario Forecasting*.

Repository: https://github.com/uzairlol/pk-pr-simulator  
Charter: `docs/01-project-charter.md`

The charter locks:

- **Framing:** aggregate cohort-level decision support (not individual profiling)
- **Sector:** telecommunications (PTA calibration data)
- **MVP:** English-first, news + GDELT + one social connector, daily simulation steps
- **Success criteria:** numeric targets on CRPS, calibration, NLP F1, and reproducibility

I have also completed Phase 1 supporting documents (literature matrix, data legal notes, ethics application draft) and am preparing to submit the ethics application to `[IRB name]`.

**Request:** Could you please reply confirming approval of the charter v1.0 dated 2026-06-25, or list any required changes? I will not begin real platform data collection until both your sign-off and ethics approval are in place.

Thank you,  
`[Your name]`  
`[University, Department]`

---

After approval, update Section 8 of `docs/01-project-charter.md` and mark the item complete in `docs/PHASE1_COMPLETION.md`.
